global_context.scene_description: Direct top-down photograph of a surgical operating table scene, but the 'patient' on the table is a competitor HVAC quote document laid flat. The quote is surrounded by a blue surgical drape that frames it like a patient prepped for surgery. Inside the drape opening, the quote is visible with 'HVAC REPLACEMENT — TOTAL: $15,000' in bold text at the top. The quote has red surgical incision lines drawn across specific line items in red marker — roughly 4-5 line items are circled or struck through. The excised line items are pinned or placed on a metal surgical tray to the right of the quote, each with a small handwritten label: 'SALES COMMISSION $2,400', 'PREMIUM MARKUP $3,500', 'DIAGNOSTIC FEE $1,800', 'CORPORATE OVERHEAD $1,300'. On the opposite side (left of the quote), a stainless steel surgical tray holds a scalpel, forceps, and a red surgical marker. A pair of blue-gloved surgeon's hands enters the frame from the top of the scene, one holding the scalpel just above the quote, mid-operation. At the bottom of the quote, the original 'TOTAL: $15,000' is crossed out with a single red line, and a new price '$9,500' is written below it in red marker. Harsh overhead operating-room lighting casts crisp shadows. The scene has the sterile, high-contrast feel of an operating room. Across the top 15% of the image, bold white sans-serif headline text on a slim dark bar reads 'WE OPERATE ON YOUR HVAC QUOTE.' Across the bottom 12%, a solid red rectangular banner contains bold white text 'BEAT MY QUOTE →' on the left and the ASH Cooling & Heating logo on the right.

composition.framing: Medium — operating table fills ~80% of frame, headline top 15%, CTA bottom 12%
composition.focal_point: The quote being operated on, with red incision lines visible and scalpel poised above
composition.notes: Reserve top 15% for headline bar. Reserve bottom 12% for red CTA banner. Surgical scene in middle 73%.
